testimonials.text: Sarthi SIP helped me structure a diverse Mutual Fund SIP portfolio. Their transparency, fee clarity, and periodic reviews have given me absolute trust in my wealth journey.
testimonials.name: Rajesh Patel
testimonials.subtitle: Business Owner, Nikol, Ahmedabad

testimonials.text: The tax strategies recommended by Sheetal Suthar saved me over ₹60,000 in deductions. She helped me mapping ELSS fund lock-ins and medical covers seamlessly.
testimonials.name: Priya Sharma
testimonials.subtitle: Lead software engineer, Bengaluru

testimonials.text: Siddharth Pandya's property valuation report was highly accurate and legally sound. It helped our family complete a secure commercial lease negotiations in Ahmedabad.
testimonials.name: Amit Trivedi
testimonials.subtitle: Director, Manufacturing, Delhi NCR
